Total Fields
Reporting Member ID should be 10 digit alphanumric value (As assigned by CIBIL e.g. BN09870001)
Consumer Name should be name and surname  
Date reported as DDMMYYYY (eg. 31121950)
Gender:  Put numeric value 

Male -2 Female -1
State code:
 Code given in guideline (Refer Annexure "    " Page no "   " of TUDF Guide attached)
Pincode:  Should be 6 digit and should fall between series mentioned in TUDF Guide Page num.
Address category: 
Code given in guideline
Current/New Member Code,Current/New Member Short Name  

as given by CIBIL
Curr/New Account No:Maximum length 25 
Must contain the account number assigned by
 the member to the borrower.
Account Type:
Code given in guideline (E.g. For Credit Card its 10.)
Ownership Indicator: 
Code given in guideline (E.g. 
Date Opened/Disbursed: DDMMYYYY account opening date (E.g. 31122004)
Date Reported: DDMMYYYY last month date
High Credit/Sanctioned Amt: Maximum length 9 ,Approve loan amount
Current  Balance: Maximum length 10, current balance of loanee
File  name : <REPORTING MEMBER ID should be 10 digits> - <Data type>-<data cycle upload date in DDMMYYYY>-<Date of file creation in DDMMYYYY format> - <File 
creation time in HHMMSS format>.txt or.xls


-
e.g. NB44550001-Consumerdata_31122021_12012022_233259.xlsx or .xls or .txt
*
do not edit or change header name of excel format, kindly use format as it is.
Numerical values should be in whole numbers except for Rate of Interest column in TL segment
Key words to be avoided in production data submission file name.
